self.current_epoch_data
            .as_mut()
            .expect("should be Some when adding new imm").add_imm

spilled_tasks
            .iter()
            .rev()
            .map(|task_id| {
                let (sst, spill_table_ids) = self
                    .unsync_data
                    .spilled_data
                    .remove(task_id)
                    .expect("should exist");
                assert!(
                    spill_table_ids.is_subset(&all_table_ids),
                    "spilled tabled ids {:?} not a subset of sync table id {:?}",
                    spill_table_ids,
                    all_table_ids
                );
                sst
            }).collect
